hacbf167eg94ccg44c4gaf10g39eababcdd5f: Last I saw you, you were lying in a crucible's worth of blood, an intellect devourer nibbling at your ear.
h988f45d7g1f7cg40f1gaf2cgde51c4908366: Glad to see my eyes deceived me. I'm Gale. Well met!
h3bc4220dg117bg427ag81d5g36ba8ae7bd02: Something's off. You get the feeling that biting this man would be... unpleasant.
hafc4196fga746g4d2ag8918gd96c64499ee9: We went through a traumatising experience - if an instructive one.
hef4b87b5g0320g488agb2b7g1ff195741671: Well met. You were on the ship as well, I presume?
h7671c4d1g1311g4183g8053g5591c1ca1457: The very same. A traumatising experience - if an instructive one.
ha6dfe174g9cb1g4f0dgb096gcd9e675432d9: By trauma I suppose you mean the thing they put in my eye.
h824055b3g1e8eg48fdg8ee4gd327d9f2b475: Yes. The ocular penetration by an illithid tadpole which will end with our souls being snuffed like strands of Weave caught in Dead Magic.
h3b8e3d45g3878g456dgb552gd2f734053e09: Instructive? What makes you say that?
hcf393c99gdf32g480dga305g36216cd563f0: Nautiloids are incredibly rare vessels: a mind flayer colony's most guarded secret - and a gith pack's greatest prize.
h6e1e7fa4gaa68g46cfga0e3g6ea44cf95346: This one knows what he's talking about.
h53a2ad62g0de5g4730ga043g6d5e18948276: You're staring at me like a Rashemi at a blackboard. You're no wizard, are you?
h274670a1g9352g489cga700g9f160ad83e6d: You've misplaced your manners, saer wizard. Take care lest your teeth go the same way.
h3094a36cgf6d5g4551g9a28g57ac8b56d1b2: Pity. But that'll have to wait. The primary need now is a healer.
hf794baafg2271g4350gbb30gd7afe8376a7f: I take it you recall the insertion of the parasite?
h38e02728g2b58g48deg8448gacdf2af3fcff: I recall, all right. And I'm already enjoying its effects.
hb903d4b3g38a4g4da9g849dg9250fe8652b0: Are you aware that after a period of excruciating gestation it will turn us into mind flayers?
hc6436326gb838g422dgbe02gb6993a4cb599: I assume you're no accomplished healer either? A powerful cleric maybe?
h9feffe35ge516g4436g84bfgc5b916c28e15: Then we'll have to find one - and fast.
h704bb66eg6a53g4b7bg929dg9f43470adedd: You and I are in a whole lot of trouble. We need help and I'm not sure where we'll find it in this wilderness.
h73ede45ege171g4449gad7egf82152deb516: How about we embark on the quest for a healer together?
hd35c6c92gc3fcg416egacadgc230c83045cf: That sounds like a plan. You're welcome to join me.
h72089ab5ga978g4961g8dddgcb78c9419f94: Most excellent! Then without further ado, let's be off!
h991e46e9g2a8dg4aa3g8dc5gacee983f4640: Most excellent! Then without further ado, let's be off!
h3d86f328g1291g4680ga4f7g06c919eb06c2: Besides, looks like you keep some interesting company.
hb40e2ddag4ab3g47c7g9861g22850b737c56: A woman with shadows for eyes - deep as the Darklake. A pleasure, madam.
h92342274g4b24g4e45g80f8gc40fc0878d2e: I see you've even a Githyanki among your ranks. I say we're off to a promising start.
hcc76fad7g2961g45fbgb5b3g265aeb195975: I see you've even a Githyanki among your ranks. I say we're off to a promising start.
h66c8f9b6g6944g4448gb0a4g4717731b3d83: I'd happily accept, but you're not the leader of your little troupe, are you? Not your call to make, I'm afraid.
he6bcf632gd9c2g4ad3gbef1gd52fd3f7c80c: And I'm flattered, I'm sure - but it seems you're travelling with a substantial amount of companions already. Maybe later, yes?
hf0bd66f6g4cdeg46f7gb9c6g567e02b2c223: No, thank you. I'm not looking for another travelling companion.
hd6a443bcg4e17g407eg8da0gfb5c08293c46: Are you certain? A wizard is a mighty weapon to have in your arsenal.
h8220731eg7d28g4c99gb81cg949b24ad7fb1: Fair enough. Yes, I'd like you to join me after all.
h9a3056adg4f86g45adg8d00g02c3deff9046: Oh good gracious me, not this again!
h91e7dc95g256cg4b1cg86edgcba9754efa31: Why can't you just use magic?
h03b48e4fgd448g4d3eg8588g32406e078eb2: Sadly my studies of the arcane are on hold for the foreseeable future. This is beyond me.
h66d34cecgb3b0g4916ga865g4424a5589ca1: Look, is this a conversation or an interrogation?
h0b0c3b98gcfa6g4c37ga8a6gd7e60da34f94: Just trying to figure out where we stand. Conclusion: nowhere.
ha71ec5d9g2ea9g4287g8799g9f314912bbb7: I can tend to basic wounds and ailments, but I can't remove alien parasites.
h79e58701g096fg4470ga71eg9f9d26abf072: I gathered as much. We'll have to look for a solution elsewhere.
h70eb6e08g7f8cg46cdg81d7g52a2f486a3b0: I am. My patron god grants me many spells.
h58051432g1c53g4bc1g9249ga6dd9e4dec29: I am. My patron goddess grants me many spells.
h911e6b3bg164fg46abg8577g242e2cbabf18: But not the power to remove tadpoles, I gather.
h1f320668g6facg4c8dg9146g85a396ec0692: Then we'll have to find someone more experienced - and fast.
h14bf7cd6ge767g48cagb8f3g780602284e69: I admit such a feat eludes me - for now.
h2cf05e58g1d59g4184gb288g467ae21b1ebe: I pray daily, so I may be granted that power yet.
hf4d0f5a1gc0fag4b13ga290g2838b593cde2: How about we look for someone who already has that power?
h4f817258geb72g49aag80f9g59a4753eccf6: Are you aware that after a period of excruciating gestation it will turn us into mind flayers?
h68255d9agd610g4c13ga0ddg1de2076de440: Then you know what happens next. It is to be avoided.
h46b9ae5dgcb0dg4490gbb83gcf8a73cc2fbe: That could have all been an illusion. A bad dream.
h4040d915gd2bfg42b2g9968g7a023848fc9a: No. The voices you heard, the visions you saw: they were all real. As were the parasites.
hd27047dag5b98g41e6g81f3gb90eaf2ef196: After a period of excruciating gestation they will turn us into mind flayers.
ha9230f44g99beg4c21gace2ga9c1a2bfe258: A common Githyanki nightmare no doubt, but I assure you what happened to us was quite real.
hcf3a4c20g6b38g4bb8gad90gf9c2e60d6305: You know what happens next. It is to be avoided.
hd73e574eg3399g40e2gb8e8geac439b25cc9: Gotcha. Private. Nothing to do with me.
h923d9e1cg1730g4240g97ecg5a3a59ea250a: Because I need one. But it'll have to wait. The primary need now is a healer.
hb1b53ba6gc296g4280g914agd2a2d137adf6: I don't take kindly to insults.
h22cfdc64g9c49g48dcgb19agb7b834e1758d: Thin-skinned - and a dodger of questions. Usually means the answer's no.
h280d790dg3459g47d0ga056g1c63871fddd0: Guess that'll have to wait. The primary need now is a healer.
hd51064cag87c7g4652g9487g890b5c2a2af3: I don't take kindly to insults either.
hbaa96193g8747g4306g9c05g1f6c6ea6da20: There's gust of Weave about you, but it's a mere breeze. I need a tempest.
ha49ee133g7bd8g4562ga6d1g3d34fa6f0f90: It'll have to wait. The primary need is a healer.
h6275d7e2gf9a2g4e65ga639g1081b0557b90: I'm better than a wizard: I'm a warlock.
h16412f13g5f0bg4d4bga75bgb59d33dc80bb: You're too hungry. Go for the neck.
h775d1d57g0451g466cg8d57g28c29b42dffe: I'm not quite in the mood for flippant answers.
h68f1dd15gb92eg4d73g9ca4g004f266d002f: Suit yourself - I merely sought to share the wonder of the experience.
h22c18c3fg78cag4c17g9ebfgee3bd228e1aa: See that rune? Netherese, I think. Weave's so thick on it, it's almost viscous.
hbf0f893fg7f1dg4ca3g9a7ag6a9b5cdf3a15: I had a taste and just like that - swept from one rune to the next.
h4e72a96cg92feg411egb68cg65810052ffa4: You don't trust him. Draw your weapon.
h665af2b9g1d03g47cag8073g14bf896177ea: Ooh - easy does it, lad. You really, really don't want to do that. Not a threat, just an observation.
h370b64c8gc61dg4df8gac55gc3c5698e3b63: Ooh - easy does it, lass. You really, really don't want to do that. Not a threat, just an observation.
hc89b902cg5893g4084g8378ge9eb8d3f4e87: Besides, we just survived a stint through Hell on a nautiloid.
ha2a3818dg455ag48cdgac8dg5c656e354296: Statistically speaking we're anomalies on par with a convivial aboleth.
h1a5ad331g7c13g4461gb814g84d409d507dd: Reason answered by reason! Say - are you perchance a wizard?
hca36759egd5c8g4189g8010g3ac582944f37: No, I'm no wizard. Arch or otherwise.
hf901891dg7f3cg4ed8g8ecagf17ca9e41f46: If there's one thing I don't care for, it's bloody wizards.
h5b1e4ec0gb289g4eb6g9010g163baea2a44f: I'm no Elminster, but I can hold my own.
h2ed24e1fgec45g447agb8c2g20d2369c2c6c: I'm better than a wizard: I'm a warlock.
hb455ce67g8e10g480fg9c1eg3779a75f5580: And why would I really, really not want attack you?
h7c1c3f79ga03dg45c5g8bebg8000a843e964: We'll get to that. I have a much more pressing question first:
h096a7cdbgcb35g4ac4g9a45g9ac72c6a2608: Are you perchance a wizard? To be more precise: an archwizard.
h29ae5221g1a25g4e8bg9c88g8457dac5b178: Dear me. Let's hope I win - bound to be innocents around.
h6a9a14c8gb666g4281gbbafg2a981fe06867: My, I hope it has been made abundantly clear that to kill me is... counterproductive.
h266f81c6g2501g4154g8962ge17fce52a310: I'd thank you for bringing me back to life, but your ending it in the first place has me rather in two minds about you.
heaa6f0c9g034dg4395g9282ga38dffc39112: That said, despite my return to the land of the living my predicament remains, and so of course does yours.
hcfc69609gf457g43d9ga980g09efdcc74938: As such, I'm feeling magnanimous enough to let bygones be bygones. A healer is what we need. Shall we?
